# Chapter 01 Meta Notes - Chapter 1

## Meta entries

[[CH01-P0010]] Topic: Opens with arrival; Mars dust motif and urgency.

[[CH01-P0020]] Topic: Announces destination and her role; sets immediate objective.

[[CH01-P0030]] Topic: Introduces Marnette’s faith and grounding ritual (beads).

[[CH01-P0040]] Topic: Establishes colony transit system and her unfamiliarity with Masters.

[[CH01-P0050]] Topic: Reveals she was specifically requested; raises mystery/importance.

[[CH01-P0060]] Topic: Shows anxiety; frames duty/calling and stakes of performance.

[[CH01-P0070]] Topic: First glimpse of Master-sector privilege via corridor and sunlight.

[[CH01-P0080]] Topic: Worldbuilds elite aesthetics; secular history vs sacred upbringing.

[[CH01-P0090]] Topic: Introduces Elara, an older salve with status in household.

[[CH01-P0100]] Topic: Elara identifies herself; sets guide/mentor dynamic.

[[CH01-P0110]] Topic: Marnette’s deference and ‘honor’ mindset.

[[CH01-P0120]] Topic: Elara hints challenge; Frost awake and waiting (tension).

[[CH01-P0130]] Topic: Contrasts class markers; Marnette’s professional observational habit.

[[CH01-P0140]] Topic: Marnette probes Frost’s temperament; foreshadows difficulty.

[[CH01-P0150]] Topic: Elara characterizes Frost as ‘thoughtful’; he chose Marnette (hook).

[[CH01-P0160]] Topic: Backstory: Elder Maris case; proves Marnette’s competence.

[[CH01-P0170]] Topic: Elara acknowledges Maris’s reputation; social context.

[[CH01-P0180]] Topic: Marnette frames death as peace and readiness; her worldview.

[[CH01-P0190]] Topic: Elara’s ‘for a salve’ line underscores caste cruelty.

[[CH01-P0200]] Topic: Unpacks phrase as comfort/condemnation; deepens theme of design.

[[CH01-P0210]] Topic: Reveals Frost’s age and historical proximity; raises awe.

[[CH01-P0220]] Topic: Marnette’s reaction: longevity as curse; contrasts castes.

[[CH01-P0230]] Topic: Timeline: Frost dying soon; urgency escalates.

[[CH01-P0240]] Topic: Entering Frost’s suite; reinforces opulence and scale.

[[CH01-P0250]] Topic: Panoramic view beyond dome; expands Mars setting and isolation.

[[CH01-P0260]] Topic: Visual center: frail man in bed; mortality amid luxury.

[[CH01-P0270]] Topic: Names Frost; anchors antagonist/mentor figure.

[[CH01-P0280]] Topic: Describes Frost’s body vs sharp mind; intriguing contradiction.

[[CH01-P0290]] Topic: Maps room zones, books; hints scholarship and secrets.

[[CH01-P0300]] Topic: Contextualizes Frost’s public legend vs present fragility.

[[CH01-P0310]] Topic: Focus on Frost’s eyes; establishes his piercing intelligence.

[[CH01-P0320]] Topic: Marnette formally introduces herself; respect protocol.

[[CH01-P0330]] Topic: Frost tests her up close; power dynamic begins.

[[CH01-P0340]] Topic: Marnette shifts into caregiver mode; sensory detail and tech.

[[CH01-P0350]] Topic: Close-up of Frost’s frailty; flags clinical concerns.

[[CH01-P0360]] Topic: Frost notes her youth; challenges expectations.

[[CH01-P0370]] Topic: Marnette states age/experience; asserts credibility.

[[CH01-P0380]] Topic: Frost’s scrutiny feels invasive; builds unease.

[[CH01-P0390]] Topic: Marnette states credo of purpose; reinforces doctrine.

[[CH01-P0400]] Topic: Frost probes sincerity of faith; introduces skepticism.

[[CH01-P0410]] Topic: Marnette equates doubt with blasphemy; shows rigidity.

[[CH01-P0420]] Topic: Frost resists help; pride and cost of movement; asks about Maris.

[[CH01-P0430]] Topic: Marnette answers carefully; demonstrates training and taboos.

[[CH01-P0440]] Topic: Frost questions salve lifespan limits; plants first heresy-seed.

[[CH01-P0450]] Topic: Marnette deflects with doctrine; tension between belief and inquiry.

[[CH01-P0460]] Topic: Frost compliments her professionalism; establishes his perceptiveness.

[[CH01-P0470]] Topic: Marnette generalizes ‘born for work’; reinforces caste ideology.

[[CH01-P0480]] Topic: Frost feigns weariness; ends meeting but promises more.

[[CH01-P0490]] Topic: Marnette offers blessing; closes first encounter politely.

[[CH01-P0500]] Topic: Frost calls her back; signals unfinished agenda.

[[CH01-P0510]] Topic: Marnette responds; keeps servant-master rhythm.

[[CH01-P0520]] Topic: Frost asks about dreaming of Earth; key thematic hook.

[[CH01-P0530]] Topic: Explains Earth taboo/history; shows cultural conditioning.

[[CH01-P0540]] Topic: Marnette denies Earth longing; chooses safe answer.

[[CH01-P0550]] Topic: Frost warns history returns; ominous foreshadowing.

[[CH01-P0560]] Topic: Transition back to corridor; removes spotlight.

[[CH01-P0570]] Topic: Elara observes Frost’s rare approval; raises Marnette’s stakes.

[[CH01-P0580]] Topic: Marnette reports Earth question; shows her uncertainty.

[[CH01-P0590]] Topic: Elara’s pause signals danger; validates weirdness.

[[CH01-P0600]] Topic: Marnette asks if unusual; seeks guidance.

[[CH01-P0610]] Topic: Elara frames ‘real history’ vs official; caution introduced.

[[CH01-P0620]] Topic: Marnette asks what ‘careful’ means; invites rule explanation.

[[CH01-P0630]] Topic: Elara delivers aphorism about unsafe questions; sets thriller tone.

[[CH01-P0640]] Topic: Introduces Marnette’s room and access door; practical stakes.

[[CH01-P0650]] Topic: Logistics: belongings, dinner, routines; grounds new setting.

[[CH01-P0660]] Topic: Marnette’s gratitude; shows her modest baseline.

[[CH01-P0670]] Topic: Elara explains funeral/mourning; widens consequences of assignment.

[[CH01-P0680]] Topic: Marnette acknowledges rarity; shows foreknowledge.

[[CH01-P0690]] Topic: Elara warns about being ‘too observant’; paranoia escalates.

[[CH01-P0700]] Topic: Marnette alone; unpacks personal items; humanizes her.

[[CH01-P0710]] Topic: Hunger vs duty; she prioritizes patient over self.

[[CH01-P0720]] Topic: Night check: equipment, meds; establishes competence and routine.

[[CH01-P0730]] Topic: Frost wakes; confirms her presence and duty.

[[CH01-P0740]] Topic: Marnette affirms assignment; loyalty established.

[[CH01-P0750]] Topic: Frost plays with ‘need’; flips dependency/power theme.

[[CH01-P0760]] Topic: Marnette differentiates service from need; self-definition.

[[CH01-P0770]] Topic: Frost praises her gentleness; contrasts others’ impatience.

[[CH01-P0780]] Topic: Marnette articulates empathy about dying; emotional truth.

[[CH01-P0790]] Topic: Frost notes her experience with death; draws her out.

[[CH01-P0800]] Topic: Marnette lists past deaths; validates expertise and trauma.

[[CH01-P0810]] Topic: Frost asks what she learned; philosophical turn.

[[CH01-P0820]] Topic: Marnette observes universal fear; deepens mortality theme.

[[CH01-P0830]] Topic: Frost asks if she fears death; personal stakes sharpen.

[[CH01-P0840]] Topic: Marnette defers to Elom; shows avoidance and obedience.

[[CH01-P0850]] Topic: Frost questions Elom’s inner life; destabilizes theology.

[[CH01-P0860]] Topic: Marnette insists Elom beyond boredom; defensive faith.

[[CH01-P0870]] Topic: Frost suggests doctrine may be control; foreshadows revelation.

[[CH01-P0880]] Topic: Marnette recites stability dogma; frames change as chaos.

[[CH01-P0890]] Topic: Frost links ‘working’ to enforced ignorance; reaches for device.

[[CH01-P0900]] Topic: Marnette protests; recognizes boundary being crossed.

[[CH01-P0910]] Topic: Frost insists she read; tactile contact and ‘open eyes’ motif.

[[CH01-P0920]] Topic: Marnette asks what device is; curiosity awakens.

[[CH01-P0930]] Topic: Frost defines it as un-sanitized stories; hands off inciting object.

[[CH01-P0940]] Topic: Marnette retreats with device; senses taboo and danger.

[[CH01-P0950]] Topic: Rationalizes as death-delirium; compares to prior patients.

[[CH01-P0960]] Topic: Dinner scene: food tastes like ash; device’s gravitational pull.

[[CH01-P0970]] Topic: Prayer for guidance; duty vs temptation sharpened.

[[CH01-P0980]] Topic: Device activation and old interface; hints authenticity/age.

[[CH01-P0990]] Topic: Title ‘Early Colony Records’; promises forbidden content.

[[CH01-P1000]] Topic: Reading marathon; cognitive dissonance begins.

[[CH01-P1010]] Topic: Revelation: selection by Musk/genetics, not divine choice.

[[CH01-P1020]] Topic: More records: longevity experiments and redactions; mystery deepens.

[[CH01-P1030]] Topic: Key concepts: castes, lifespan limits, population control; stakes explode.

[[CH01-P1040]] Topic: Church origin reframed as engineered propaganda; core myth threatened.

[[CH01-P1050]] Topic: She shuts device; fear and intrusive phrases echo.

[[CH01-P1060]] Topic: Prayer attempt; shows coping and desire for certainty.

[[CH01-P1070]] Topic: Prayer feels hollow; internal shift and seed of doubt.

[[CH01-P1080]] Topic: Window reflection: colony paradox of life on Mars; thematic lens.

[[CH01-P1090]] Topic: One-line punch: possibility of manipulation; crystallizes suspicion.

[[CH01-P1100]] Topic: She tries to reject thought; Earth question resurfaces.

[[CH01-P1110]] Topic: Childhood Earth dream; introduces buried longing and sensory contrast.

[[CH01-P1120]] Topic: Escalating ‘what if’ questions; reframes colony as experiment.

[[CH01-P1130]] Topic: Spoken denial; shows panic and taboo awareness.

[[CH01-P1140]] Topic: Bed scene: considers reporting; highlights moral crossroads.

[[CH01-P1150]] Topic: Justifies listening as caregiving; chooses secrecy for now.

[[CH01-P1160]] Topic: Insomnia and looping phrases; tension sustains into night.

[[CH01-P1170]] Topic: Sets tomorrow’s mask of professionalism; promises internal conflict.

[[CH01-P1180]] Topic: Admits she is wondering; marks point-of-no-return trajectory.

[[CH01-P1190]] Topic: Looks out at domes; temptation of answers vs risk.

[[CH01-P1200]] Topic: Extended closing: transformation underway; dust-as-knowledge metaphor.
